name: Twinbird Corporation
summary: Twinbird Corporation manufactures and sells home appliances. It offers home bakery, bread mix, and multi home cooker; microwave ovens, oven toasters/ovens, toasters, electric pan/hot plates, hot sandwich makers, IH cookers, flyers, liquor machines, and roasters; electric kettles and coffee makers; vinegar makers, oil pots, food processors, mixers/juicers, shaved ice, food steamers, tea whisk, and other cooking appliances; and rice milling devices. The company also provides horizontal type, stick, and handy cleaners; LED lighting equipment, fluorescent lamps, incandescent sphere, and other lighting equipment; air cleaners, humidifiers, circulators, fans, and tower fans; iron-handy steamers and trouser pressers; ultrasonic cleaners; and refrigerators, electronic cold storage, washing machines, wine cellars, shoe and futon dryers, other consumer electronics, and audio monitors. In addition, it offers head, skin, nail, body, and other beauty care products, as well as cleansing brushes and hair dryers; health equipment, such as handy, foot, and seat massagers; and home installation bathroom televisions(TVs), home security products, waterproof AV products, liquid crystal TVs, speakers, CD players, radios, and other AV equipment. The company was formerly known as Nomizu Denka Co., Ltd. Twinbird Corporation was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Tsubame, Japan.
